name: comic-script-pandoc
description: Pandoc LUA Writers for parsing comic scripts for digital lettering.

scripts.push-patch: node dev/general/confirm-run.js && npm version patch && git push
scripts.push-minor: node dev/general/confirm-run.js && npm version minor && git push
scripts.push-major: node dev/general/confirm-run.js && npm version major && git push

author: Hika "HK★TMK" P.
